themes.name: [Negative] Poor Order Execution and Delayed Transactions

quotes.text: The most frustrating part is that even when the market moves in profit direction, the delayed execution and poor order matching reduce or completely destroy the gains.
For a financial trading application, execution speed and price accuracy are the most basic expectations. Unfortunately INDMoney fails badly in this area.

themes.description: INDMoney users consistently experience slippage, delayed order execution, and non-existent support for issues related to order processing and fund transfers, causing financial losses.
themes.business_impact: Financial losses and potential loss of customer trust due to repeated instances of delayed transactions, incorrect order execution, and inability to resolve issues promptly.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The root cause of this issue is likely a flawed order execution engine, inadequate testing, and insufficient support processes.
themes.action_plan:
• Review and optimize the order execution engine
• Implement a more robust testing framework
• Provide dedicated support for critical issues
• Increase transparency around transaction processing times and order status
• Enhance customer communication regarding delays and resolution progress.

themes.name: [Negative] Poor Performance and Features

quotes.text: if u want to loose ur money then invest with this app
Jack of all but master of None

themes.description: Several users mentioned that the app has performance issues, lacks essential features, and has an uninformative user interface, affecting their overall experience and making it inferior to other similar platforms like Zerodha.
themes.business_impact: Loss of customers due to poor feature set and user experience, potentially significant revenue loss as customers switch to competitors.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: App's current infrastructure and prioritization of features are not aligned with the needs of its target market.
themes.action_plan: • Improve app's performance and add essential features such as advanced portfolio rebalancing, transaction categorization, and a full budgeting system. Conduct user research to better understand the target market's needs and prioritize features accordingly.

themes.name: [Negative] App Bugs, UI Issues, and Poor User Experience

quotes.text: farzii app hai order exicute par phle hi brokerage kaat lete hai our fir baad ne profit ko bhi transit money me rokk lete hai our fir wapas usme se bhi phle kati hui brokerage ko wapas kaat lete hai,,
bhai logo esko leak ko sudhaaroo jo anjal one ya zeroodha walo ki tarhaa ham indmoney wale bhi profit me aaye

themes.description: Users have reported various issues with the app, including app crashes, poor UI, inability to open US accounts, issues with brokerage, and other UX problems. Some have also mentioned concerns about being misled into trading losses. There are also demands for added features, such as emergency fund options, SLBM, and more.
themes.business_impact: High volume of negative reviews, potential loss of customer trust, and missed revenue opportunities due to lack of desired features.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Lack of thorough quality control and user testing during app development might have led to a plethora of UX issues, while inadequate feature set is causing users to lose faith in the product.
themes.action_plan: • Conduct a thorough bug-fixing sweep, revamp the user interface to make it more intuitive, implement rigorous quality control measures, address user feature requests, and reevaluate the core product to better meet user needs, all while prioritizing UI/UX enhancements and feature additions.
